title: Where does Rebirth and EoE separate
display_title: Where does Rebirth and EoE separate
wikitext:
[]: Where does Rebirth and EoE separate?             Quote Post by cd603 » Wed Jul 27, 2011 7:54 pm I've been reading around and I know that Death and Rebirth were released to the Japanese public as one movie. However, I also know that Rebirth was the incomplete version of EoE, with the film ending on a cliff-hanger-of-sorts. So my question is: Where does Rebirth end and EoE pick up? Does it pick up right after the middle credits or does it cut at a different point? (I've also read the fan letters and some of them express great amounts of rage over the films ending. Does the original Rebirth film even make it to the part were Shinji screams after seeing Unit 02 ripped apart?)

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Wed Jul 27, 2011 8:00 pm Rebirth ends when the Eva Series appear and they start flying above Nerv HQ.

[]:             Quote Post by svenge » Thu Jul 28, 2011 7:47 am That must've been one heck of a cliffhanger back in '97. The 9 harpies circling over Eva-02 vulture-style with the beginning of "Tamashii no Refrain" in the background... Having to wait 4 months to see if/how Asuka got out of that one would've been tough. The sense of suspense during that scene was probably the one thing that was actually "lost" (in an emotional sense) when Gainax went from using Death and Rebirth and The End of Evangelion to the combined "Revival of Evangelion" film with Death(True)² + Air + Magokoro wo kimi ni as their definitive theatrical version...

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Thu Jul 28, 2011 6:10 pm ^well, probably watching Rebirth AND Air consecutively wasn't really an interesting experience for most viewers. It's already amazing that they've published it on home video (before the Revival), considering that Rebirth was more like a teaser than anything else.

[]:             Quote Post by svenge » Fri Jul 29, 2011 1:09 am Hyper Shinchan wrote: ^well, probably watching Rebirth AND Air consecutively wasn't really an interesting experience for most viewers. It's already amazing that they've published it on home video (before the Revival), considering that Rebirth was more like a teaser than anything else.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Jul 29, 2011 12:06 pm I guess that would explain why both New Movie Edition films have been released on DVD/BD of May 26th or 27th of the year following their airing in theaters, then! (Except for 1.01, of course. I mean 1.11 and 2.22.) Also, this information really ties in with how people were pissed off about Rebirth's cliffhanger ending, not about EoTV's WTF ending. (The "death threats" were regarding Rebirth, not End of TV.) Thanks~

[]:             Quote Post by cd603 » Fri Jul 29, 2011 8:08 pm Just so I'm clear, Rebirth ends with the Mass Production Evas circling above Unit 02, not with Shinji screaming after see Unit 02 destroyed?

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Fri Jul 29, 2011 8:16 pm cd603 wrote: Just so I'm clear, Rebirth ends with the Mass Production Evas circling above Unit 02, not with Shinji screaming after see Unit 02 destroyed?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Jul 29, 2011 8:17 pm Yes. The official music video even begins with that: http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=N2qbNbUbQfQ

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Fri Jul 29, 2011 8:22 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Yes. The official music video even begins with that: http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=N2qbNbUbQfQ

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Jul 29, 2011 8:24 pm See here: http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=2740

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Fri Jul 29, 2011 8:26 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: See here: http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=2740

[]:             Quote Post by svenge » Sat Jul 30, 2011 3:53 am The music video with footage of Yoko Takahashi singing (as seen on the Renewal "monolith" bonus disc ) was a contemporary PV from the time the movie (and CD single ) was released, and was even featured on the "Genesis 0:0' - THE LIGHT FROM THE DARKNESS" VHS tape. The animated video (as linked by SSD) came from the NGE Music DVD that was released in 2006, which was 9 years after the original work. It all depends on how you define PVs. If you define a PV as any official music video, the NGE Music DVD video fits that definition. If you define a PV as a video promoting the (then-current) release of a CD/film, it doesn't. The way I see it, the NGE Music DVD isn't a PV, but a separate product building on earlier music/animation assets.

[]:             Quote Post by deeRez » Mon Aug 01, 2011 8:57 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Also, this information really ties in with how people were pissed off about Rebirth's cliffhanger ending, not about EoTV's WTF ending. (The "death threats" were regarding Rebirth, not End of TV.) Thanks~

[]:             Quote Post by JoeD80 » Mon Aug 01, 2011 10:30 pm This stuff is in the wiki: http://wiki.evageeks.org/End_of_Evangelion_Death_Threats
